review_title: Zoho Sheet, an easy yet powerful spreadsheet
description: Zoho Sheet is a blessing for people especially those who want an easy to use spreadsheet software. I use it to make reports, catalogues, graphs, and charts. I like it for constantly rolling out updates that keeps it making better.
author: Aatif Khurshaid K.
pros: Zoho Sheet has the capability to be as powerful as you require. It's a fantastic spreadsheet tool for the casual as well as professional users that can be used to monitor just about anything. Zoho Sheet offers formulae, tables, and other tools that will allow you to track, analyse, and show your financial data like never before. Formulas, pivot tables, and copy/paste makes your job much easier and reduce the amount of time you spend manually entering data and adding numbers together. To sum up, its a perfect software to use for any sort of accounting, financial and management tasks, calculation or sorting large data.
cons: I have been using Zoho sheet for quite a time now, and haven't encountered any major mentioning worth issue in it till now.

review_title: Amazing Software for Team Collaboration with Spreadsheet Maintenance
description: Overall it is Reliable spreadsheet maintenance software. Good amount of features with which anyone can create clean spreadsheets.
author: Revanth S.
pros: Easy to use and maintain Spreadsheets. Team Collaboration in Good in Zoho Sheets. Multiple users can open same spreadsheet at the time and can edit the data in real time. Spreadsheets are clean and easy to understand. Cloud storage is possible. Overall it is Versatile.
cons: Math Calculation features need to be more Advanced. I have seen the small delay when other team members update their data in spreadsheet.

review_title: Zoho Sheets a highly suitable replacement for Microsoft Excel, especially if using Zoho's platform
description: Just as good as using Excel so no complaints
author: Jared L.
pros: Easy to use for those who are very familiar with Microsoft Excel. No learning curve once we decided to make the switch
cons: Mobile editing sometimes was a little bit lagging, which can cause duplicates when collaborating with someone using a laptop/desktop while you are on a phone/tablet

review_title: Great to create, edit and store spreadsheets online
description: Zoho Sheets is pretty fantastic and easily replaces other software. The design is clean and the tools easy to understand and use. Its not the most widespread software in Canada but there aren't compatibility issues and its easy to learn and work with.
author: Monica V.
pros: The capability to do anything I need and the clean and user-friendly design.
cons: The single difficulty is that its not the most known platform and using the most popular products is easy as there isn't a need to think about compatibility and learning different shortcuts. Its not easy to get others to use it so until it becomes more popular, that may be a barrier to some.

review_title: It's an amazing tool if you come from excel or google
author: Rafael Alonso R.
pros: It's similar to excel or google sheets. You can use formulas, macros and integrate with zoho crm or other zoho programs
cons: When zoho is down, it usually means your sheets with stop working properly

review_title: using Zoho Sheets
description: we use it to produce estimates, timesheets and contracts based on a template we developed also use for tracking our main itinerary for truck drivers
author: David L.
pros: integrates into our suite of Zoho products nicely saves instantly to Zoho Work Drive easily shareable amongst users in the company
cons: Excell formulas dont always work in Zoho sheets Excell has more functionality with formulas and plug ins

review_title: How easy to manage budget with Zoho Sheet.
description: It allowed us to maintain updated production cost sheets, adding transparency and reducing monthly financial shocks.
author: Connor T. B.
pros: The function of applying real-time collaboration in Zoho Sheet was particularly useful we were able to have all departments collaborate on budget tracking without emailing a zillion spreadsheets back and forth.
cons: The interface isn’t as polished as Excel’s, and it occasionally requires a better refresh rate when more than one person is editing at once.

review_title: Zoho Sheet
description: Zoho Sheet is a powerful app that integrates seamless with Zoho Apps.
author: George M.
pros: Because i was already working with Excel and Sheets I made the switch without any problems. One of the most important feature for me is the collaboration, beeing able to work without any problem on the same Sheet with some of my colleagues is important for me and saves a lot of time for all of us. Another important feature for me is the ability to import data, not every body uses Zoho Sheet and importing data from other sheets apps is a must. Permissions are another important feature, you choose who can edit and who can just view.
cons: No cons, nothing to dislike at Zoho Sheet.

review_title: Effective, functional and very easy to use spreadsheet platform.
description: Zoho Sheets allows us to consolidate everything in one place in a centralized way, it is an excellent space to have all our data organized and ideal for teamwork. It allows us to jointly access, analyze and modify data, as well as comment and discuss reports, which facilitates collective decision making.
author: Alex P.
pros: I like its ease of use and its capabilities to create formulas, import and export data from different formats collected from other frequently used tools, I like that its user interface is simple and concrete, with Zoho Sheet I can extract data from images and export them to a spreadsheet, I find it very useful that I can use default templates that can be adjusted as needed. I love its innate integration with other tools of the Zoho ecosystem that make our work easier, Zoho Sheets is where we manage and analyze all the information collected from our processes, it allows us to share and disseminate information easily and effortlessly with our team no matter where we are.
cons: So far, I find nothing to dislike about Zoho Sheets, it is a very functional and effective tool, its user interface is simple to use and easy to understand, the experience we have had when using it is very positive.

review_title: Zoho Sheet: Collaborate and Acheive!
description: Zoho Sheet is a ready to use tool available in Zoho Universe. Zoho Sheet helps in collaborating and finish tasks which involves interaction with multiple users. Very affordable. Highly recommended.
author: Ankush B.
pros: Zoho Sheet is an online spreadsheet on which multiple users can work simultaneously. The data will be updated real time. Following are the pros of Zoho Sheet: - Allow real time data updating by multiple users - Secure and lock selected cells to abstain users from editing particular data - Integration with various APIs and tools - Pre formatted and designed graphs, diagrams and charts - Easily accessible on Mobile Phone - User Friendly and easy to use interface
cons: Zoho Sheet have room for improvements. Solver app needs to be improvised in comparison to Microsoft excel. Graphs and charts can be improvised.

review_title: Still using sheets
description: Zoho Sheet is a great spreadsheets for teams where multiple users need to add data in the same time. Chatting related feature is good because you can leave notes and ask for details on any data colleagues added.
author: Andrei B.
pros: Zoho apps are great and the price is just wright. Zoho Sheet is free and very powerful. Using it along with my team is easy and data synchronization is instant. Collaboration is very important in any organization. It has a beautiful and intuitive user interface and the whole team is pleased using it.
cons: Some Excel formulas did not worked but we manage to resolve another way.

review_title: Good for use, need to improve the speed.
description: For one of my company project I need to use Zoho sheets, it's have good ok integrations with all third party app. File opening with other similar company is good. Loading speed is the biggest problem I faced during use of my time . Without internet sometimes it crashes.
author: Mahmudul islam S.
pros: Zoho sheets have same function like MS word, able to make speedsheet more appealing. Have tons of template available so transforming the data is very appealing in Zoho Sheet. Zoho customer support is top notch, whenever feel problem, just contact them, they will immediately solve it. Integrations with 3rd party app is very good.
cons: Loading speed is the main issue with Zoho sheets, without internet some time it crashes. They are continuously updating themselves nowadays.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: User friendly!
description: Fantastic for business and personal use
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Excellent functionality and compatibility.
cons: Login page hard to access at times for email.

review_title: Qualidade de utilização
description: Otima plataforma, facil acesso e utilização.Design bom.
author: Stephanie A.
pros: Facilidade de uso da plataforma e possibilidade de compartilhar com outros colaboradores.
cons: ainda não tenho como dizer algo que não tenha gostado, até o momento estou satisfeita.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Working with spreadsheets for organizations using Zoho suite
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It essentially provides all the basic functionality that most organizations use for their day to day tasks which makes it a feasible solution for most companies. The list of formulae is also extensive and should get most of the work done.
cons: The short-cut keys are different from other mainstream services which causes errors in the beginning and takes awhile to get used to.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Overall satisfied with the performance of Zoho sheet application.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its pricing is okay. Those who have worked on Microsoft excel sheet will feel easy to use this spreadsheet application. It has a good number of supported features that suffice my requirement specific to sheet preparation. Navigation is pretty smooth and I have not experienced any noticeable problems.
cons: I don't see any con in it other than handling of larger files could have been better. Rest of things are fine.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very good spreadsheet
author: Josue G.
pros: Zoho sheet helps us to have a well integrated work with all the teams with an intuitive interface. By having our documents online we can share them easily and with people outside the team.
cons: Because is an online editor you may be restricted or slowed by your internet. At the beginning it could have an overwhelming appearance with a significant learning curve.

review_title: It is indispensable for me
author: Elisa S.
pros: With this software available in the cloud, I can always have at my reach, from wherever I am and with the Internet, it is very useful to generate reports and statistics. It is easy to get used to it if you already have previous experience in more popular.
cons: Perhaps for cost reasons, it is not available as a program. I would like it to be available at any time, with or without an Internet connection.

review_title: Great spreadsheet editor
author: Alisa M.
pros: In my opinion, the service is more convenient than the one from Google. I use it in everyday work, that's why I particularly appreciate the convenience and wide possibilities, which are enough for me to solve my problems.
cons: Disadvantages are the same as with any online editor: the Internet slows down and the server often hangs.

review_title: Spreadsheets everywhere
author: Iris T.
pros: Now as everything is the cloud, I could not miss this add-on. Being able to have a spreadsheet always, is excellent to keep you organized and productive.
cons: From the computer there is no problem, from the mobile is a bit complicated the use and application of formulas or formats.

review_title: Great Option
description: Excellent option if you invoice all year round! Would recommend to help organize.
author: Alexis W.
pros: I love how easy it makes tracking invoices and the status of each. The organization and templates you can create is awesome!
cons: Cost, just wasn't what we were looking for in comparison to the price. I like Eventbrite instead since they take a small portion of the profits.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A well design tool for file editing and for sharing.
description: Zoho Sheet is best application for editing documents online and comes with large number of features which completes our all needs document editing. We can easily edit our business presentation and share to other colleagues via this tool. My experience with this tool is for a year and In found this tool very helpful and it work perfectly.
author: John N.
pros: Zoho sheets has been my all time favorite and it comes with special features for editing files. Its a spreadsheet application which provide us space for organizing files and we can discus about production. We can create and edit our documents online and easily share to other colleagues. It comes with lots of features which provide us single platform for work and it makes our office work easier. Android and IOS version is also available and gives us access to our documents from anywhere.
cons: Zoho sheet works effectively for our company and has all the basic features for file editing and for file sharing, As my personal experience I can't face any serious difficulty while working with Zoho sheet its all good.

review_title: Dynamic Spreadsheet Software
description: Personally, I had trouble with Excel's VBA, which requires some programming knowledge. With Zoho Sheet, which uses a simplified programming language, you'll get the hang of it pretty quickly.
author: Rodrigue N.
pros: The programming language is simple and suitable for beginners, allowing you to automate repetitive actions and save considerable time in data entry and processing.
cons: Zoho Sheet is not well known to the general public, but it is an excellent alternative.

review_title: It's great to have a collaborative spreadsheet
description: It's the main programming that made me substitute dominate which I additionally use on a diurnal premise. I'd prescribe Google Wastes to any individual who is keen on making a yearly spending plan or daily agenda, That is exactly what Zoho Sheet does.
author: Melissa B.
pros: The cooperation highlights are my top choice. Bookkeeping pages are so significant and basic for any plan yet when you had the capacity for a considerable length of time to chip away at it simultaneously it simply takes it to another position. It's enormously cheering not to need to stress over neglecting to press the Save Button. It's one of my most valued specifics ever.
cons: While basic provisional arranging is clear, practicing custom capacities inside conditional organizing rules empowers you to direct impacts like checking for duplication.

review_title: A live spreadsheet tool with lots of excellence.
description: With are more able to produce efficiency in our work while working with Zoho sheets, cause we can easily create live sheets and share them with the clients as we want to. We can also use them as a backup tool for our business providing the most excellence service.
author: Mathew W.
pros: Zoho enables us to get our spreadsheets done in the most responsive ways. We can also create live sheets while working with the CRM for instant sharing with the clients. The Zoho suite gathers all the productive platforms at one place and allows the users to be more efficient in productivity with easy integration.
cons: However, despite of easy integration, we have also experienced issue in connecting Zoho sheets with CRM. It is also only available online via internet, which gives a setback to it as compared to Excel or any other spreadsheet tools.
